name: Verses AI Inc.
business: VERSES is a cognitive computing company specializing in next generation intelligence software systems. We are primarily focused on developing an intelligence-as-a-service smart software platform called Genius. The initial target audience for Genius is machine learning and data science professionals trying to solve enterprise problems that require prediction where there is uncertainty or hidden factors.
sellsTo: machine learning and data science professionals

exposures.sentence: VERSES is a cognitive computing company specializing in next generation intelligence software systems. We are primarily focused on developing an intelligence-as-a-service smart software platform called Genius.
Genius includes: Intelligent, autonomous software agents
VERSES has worked closely on the recently approved IEEE P2874 Spatial Web Standard designed to address interoperability and trust.

catalysts.sentence: On April 30, 2025, we announced the launch of our flagship product, Genius, which is designed to enable agentic intelligence for enterprises.
